node.title: 5th manual distribution of PART is complete.
node.plaintext:
Overfunders & Group 1 Claimants
Wednesday’s PART disbursement went out yesterday. Thank you for completing the
wallet set up, enjoy staking those tokens!

Still waiting for your PART?
Please read Post launch update: July 24th, 2017
[https://particl.news/post-launch-update-july-24th-2017-419f55ddc89f] to see the
groups we’ve identified and the steps you need to take to secure your PART
token.

📣 Our next manual distribution will be Wednesday, August 30th. Don’t wait any
longer, set up your wallet
[https://particl.news/guide-how-to-generate-your-particl-exchange-passphrase-1fd78ba36fd1] 
and get your tokens!

PART tokens not showing up in your wallet?
The best assistance you can get is from the Particl Community members in our
#help slack channel. I would encourage you to signup [http://slack.particl.io/] 
and we will get you straightened away faster than you can track a bitcoin
across
the blockchain [http://blog.wizsec.jp/2017/07/breaking-open-mtgox-1.html].

Overfunders & Group 1 Claimants

Wednesday’s PART disbursement went out yesterday. Thank you for completing the wallet set up, enjoy staking those tokens!

Still waiting for your PART?

Please read Post launch update: July 24th, 2017 to see the groups we’ve identified and the steps you need to take to secure your PART token.

📣 Our next manual distribution will be Wednesday, August 30th. Don’t wait any longer, set up your wallet and get your tokens!

PART tokens not showing up in your wallet?

The best assistance you can get is from the Particl Community members in our #help slack channel. I would encourage you to signup and we will get you straightened away faster than you can track a bitcoin across the blockchain.

node.title: PART Roadmap — v.1.1

primary_tag.name: Development Updates
primary_tag.description: See a blockchain-powered autonomous internet marketplace wunderkind grow. You make a difference with Particl.

tags.name: Development Updates
tags.description: See a blockchain-powered autonomous internet marketplace wunderkind grow. You make a difference with Particl.

tags.name: News & Updates
tags.description: The latest buzz from Particl. Tomorrow's blockchain e-commerce privacy solution for the better of all.

node.plaintext:
.Building on a strong foundation.
Particl’s first 100+ days since our seed round has seen the creation of the
Particl Foundation, a pure Proof of Stake blockchain flexible enough for 2nd
layer integrations (Lightning Network, Rootstock) and the successful launch of
our privacy token PART; the first token built on Bitcoin 0.14.2 that can claim:

 * Pure PoS(v3) (non-hybrid PoW/PoS)
 * Native SegWit (all transactions are SegWit)
 * Confidential Transactions (hidden amounts)
 * Decentralized Voting (Governance)
 * Testnet | RingCT (hidden amounts and address identities)
 * Testnet | Cold Staking

Development Process
Roadmaps are tentative, working documents, subject to revision. These documents
are important in parsing out non-goals or long term goals that, in our case,
shouldn’t tie up production on the MVP.

 * They will be released with version numbers.
 * Updates will be published as required.
 * The team will continue to add new talent
 * Some components are prerequisite for completing others, which can affect
   roadmap completion

The release sequence of items within a quarter is interchangeable. For example,
if the wallet app gets sign-off before we finalize outside partnerships it will
be released regardless of it’s place on the image.


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Particl will be integrating 3rd Party apps regularly throughout the next 2–1/2
quarters. Imran, our Commercial & Partner Strategist is putting the closing
touches on a number of partner integrations aimed to expand the usability of the
PART token.

Steady development is happening on the Electron App. Follow it on Github or
build it yourself to keep track of progress.

particl/partgui [https://github.com/particl/partgui/commits/master]
partgui - Particl Angular GUI - The source for the Particl GUI.
[https://github.com/particl/partgui/commits/master]github.com
[https://github.com/particl/partgui/commits/master]


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Already being tested on TESTNET6
[https://particl.news/weve-reset-the-testbed-today-testnet6-is-now-live-69e1c45b4f42]
, Cold Staking is the concept of “defining a node which has the sole power to
only stake.” The result is a more secure ability to stake while using
multi-signature addresses.

Cold Staking will bring protocol changes that, when launched on mainnet, will
make it the first planned hard fork on the Particl blockchain.

Creating the Particl Market is the prime goal of this Roadmap. This is the
decentralized marketplace Minimal Viable Product (MVP) everyone is most excited
for. Alpha will be well designed and bring major protocol changes.

RingCT on mainnet, the audit of Particl Core (including RingCT) and our
university Research Grant all will likely fall into Q4 as well. This is a good
example of versioning on our roadmap. Version 1.1 will get to a point it is no
longer useful, at which time we will update it to better reflect real-time
activity on the project. RingCT, for example, will be a planned hardfork on
Particl blockchain so releasing it with other Q4 protocol changes will be
considered by the team.

When we launched the Particl blockchain, 996,000 PART tokens were created and
time locked in a multi-sig address* that was reserved for our Primary funding
round. Delivering the decentralized marketplace MVP is a requirement before
these tokens can be made available.

Below are both explorers displaying this address. The insight explorer will show
the PART as available after midnight, November 30th, 2017. The CryptoID explorer
shows the full count of PART (996k) but the distribution is “unconfirmed” until
unlocked (17.11.30).

> *This is the largest PART address representing ~11% uncirculated PART.
https://explorer.particl.io/address/RNnoeeqBTkpPQH8d29Gf45dszVj9RtbmCu
https://chainz.cryptoid.info/part/address.dws?RNnoeeqBTkpPQH8d29Gf45dszVj9RtbmCu.htm
Our Primary Round and “Beta” marketplace both fall in Q1/2018. These are
parallel tracks and are unrelated to each other. The project is well funded.

The differences between Alpha and Beta are expected to be trivial, mainly bug
patching, as no significant software features will be added to the Beta release.
It is important to keep in mind Alpha/Beta are minimally viable products that
prototype features. These releases will be well done and give buyers and sellers
a solid and secure platform to transact with each other.


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Status Reporting
In our previous communication we talked about more detailed development updates.
Henk, our Project Manager has been working with the web developers to create a
new page on Particl.io [https://particl.io] that provides a breakdown of what
the team is working on, what’s in review and what is coming up at any given
time.

When this page is live we’ll announce it to the community and can have an email
signup button for users who want to be notified on status updates.

Conclusion
Believing to the core that a strong foundation must be laid before a privacy
platform can properly be built has been the Particl team’s Modus operandi since
we began. Starting with the choice to build open source, on the latest robust
Bitcoin codebase w/SegWit, to a “multi-state” PART token (public, blind, anon)
and finally the underlying privacy cryptography enhancements in Confidential
Transactions and RingCT, every step in Particl’s early existence has been
calculated.

Particl Project [https://github.com/particl]
GitHub is where people build software. More than 23 million people use GitHub
to
discover, fork, and contribute to over… [https://github.com/particl]github.com
[https://github.com/particl]

Particl is open source. Our Github is a great place for community developers to
get involved. The team works in the open and is welcoming to users who want to 
help [https://particl.io/careers].

https://particl.io/roadmap/

— Particl Team
node.html:
Building on a strong foundation.

Particl’s first 100+ days since our seed round has seen the creation of the Particl Foundation, a pure Proof of Stake blockchain flexible enough for 2nd layer integrations (Lightning Network, Rootstock) and the successful launch of our privacy token PART; the first token built on Bitcoin 0.14.2 that can claim:

  • Pure PoS(v3) (non-hybrid PoW/PoS)
  • Native SegWit (all transactions are SegWit)
  • Confidential Transactions (hidden amounts)
  • Decentralized Voting (Governance)
  • Testnet | RingCT (hidden amounts and address identities)
  • Testnet | Cold Staking

Development Process

Roadmaps are tentative, working documents, subject to revision. These documents are important in parsing out non-goals or long term goals that, in our case, shouldn’t tie up production on the MVP.

  • They will be released with version numbers.
  • Updates will be published as required.
  • The team will continue to add new talent
  • Some components are prerequisite for completing others, which can affect roadmap completion

The release sequence of items within a quarter is interchangeable. For example, if the wallet app gets sign-off before we finalize outside partnerships it will be released regardless of it’s place on the image.

Particl will be integrating 3rd Party apps regularly throughout the next 2–1/2 quarters. Imran, our Commercial & Partner Strategist is putting the closing touches on a number of partner integrations aimed to expand the usability of the PART token.

Steady development is happening on the Electron App. Follow it on Github or build it yourself to keep track of progress.

particl/partgui
partgui - Particl Angular GUI - The source for the Particl GUI.github.com

Already being tested on TESTNET6, Cold Staking is the concept of “defining a node which has the sole power to only stake.” The result is a more secure ability to stake while using multi-signature addresses.

Cold Staking will bring protocol changes that, when launched on mainnet, will make it the first planned hard fork on the Particl blockchain.

Creating the Particl Market is the prime goal of this Roadmap. This is the decentralized marketplace Minimal Viable Product (MVP) everyone is most excited for. Alpha will be well designed and bring major protocol changes.

RingCT on mainnet, the audit of Particl Core (including RingCT) and our university Research Grant all will likely fall into Q4 as well. This is a good example of versioning on our roadmap. Version 1.1 will get to a point it is no longer useful, at which time we will update it to better reflect real-time activity on the project. RingCT, for example, will be a planned hardfork on Particl blockchain so releasing it with other Q4 protocol changes will be considered by the team.

When we launched the Particl blockchain, 996,000 PART tokens were created and time locked in a multi-sig address* that was reserved for our Primary funding round. Delivering the decentralized marketplace MVP is a requirement before these tokens can be made available.

Below are both explorers displaying this address. The insight explorer will show the PART as available after midnight, November 30th, 2017. The CryptoID explorer shows the full count of PART (996k) but the distribution is “unconfirmed” until unlocked (17.11.30).

*This is the largest PART address representing ~11% uncirculated PART.

Our Primary Round and “Beta” marketplace both fall in Q1/2018. These are parallel tracks and are unrelated to each other. The project is well funded.

The differences between Alpha and Beta are expected to be trivial, mainly bug patching, as no significant software features will be added to the Beta release. It is important to keep in mind Alpha/Beta are minimally viable products that prototype features. These releases will be well done and give buyers and sellers a solid and secure platform to transact with each other.

Status Reporting

In our previous communication we talked about more detailed development updates. Henk, our Project Manager has been working with the web developers to create a new page on Particl.io that provides a breakdown of what the team is working on, what’s in review and what is coming up at any given time.

When this page is live we’ll announce it to the community and can have an email signup button for users who want to be notified on status updates.

Conclusion

Believing to the core that a strong foundation must be laid before a privacy platform can properly be built has been the Particl team’s Modus operandi since we began. Starting with the choice to build open source, on the latest robust Bitcoin codebase w/SegWit, to a “multi-state” PART token (public, blind, anon) and finally the underlying privacy cryptography enhancements in Confidential Transactions and RingCT, every step in Particl’s early existence has been calculated.

Particl Project
GitHub is where people build software. More than 23 million people use GitHub to discover, fork, and contribute to over…github.com

Particl is open source. Our Github is a great place for community developers to get involved. The team works in the open and is welcoming to users who want to help.

https://particl.io/roadmap/

— Particl Team

node.title: 4th manual distribution of PART is complete.
node.plaintext:
Overfunders & Group 1 Claimants
Wednesday’s PART disbursement went out yesterday. Thank you for completing the
wallet set up, enjoy staking those tokens!

Still waiting for your PART?
Please read Post launch update: July 24th, 2017
[https://particl.news/post-launch-update-july-24th-2017-419f55ddc89f] to see the
groups we’ve identified and the steps you need to take to secure your PART
token.

📣 Our next manual distribution will be Wednesday, August 23rd. Don’t wait any
longer, set up your wallet
[https://particl.news/guide-how-to-generate-your-particl-exchange-passphrase-1fd78ba36fd1] 
and get your tokens!

PART tokens not showing up in your wallet?
The best assistance you can get is from the Particl Community members in our
#help slack channel. I would encourage you to signup [http://slack.particl.io/] 
and we will get you straightened away faster than you can track a bitcoin
across
the blockchain [http://blog.wizsec.jp/2017/07/breaking-open-mtgox-1.html].

node.title: Blockchain information powerhouse BTC Media and Particl join forces
node.plaintext:
This is just the beginning!
Particl Foundation is proud to partner with BTC Studios- a division of BTC Media
[https://btcmedia.org], to help foster awareness on decentralized marketplaces,
individual sovereignty, right to privacy and self-governing, crypto-agnostic
platforms.

There is so much more to Particl than our PART token. Sure we’ve taken the best
Bitcoin offers and made it more private with Confidential Transactions and
RingCT. It’s true being the first token with SegWit native at launch makes all 
transactions on the Particl blockchain Segregated Witness transactions. However,
these essential privacy enhancements are only one piece of the puzzle Particl
has it’s sights set on solving. But that stuff most of you already know…

The problem is not many users outside our growing community know about Particl
and the innovative work the development team has delivered and is planning to
deliver over the next 6 months. That’s where BTC Studios comes in and we’re so
excited to begin!

BTC Media
> BTC Media’s team has over 60 years of combined publishing experience. We publish
the world’s only print magazines about the Bitcoin and blockchain industries,
and operate several of the most recognized and trusted online resources,
reaching millions of readers worldwide. Our unique insight into this world is
why leading companies, such as Nasdaq, rely on us to power their blockchain
content.
Brands:
Distributed [https://godistributed.com/]
The weekly blockchain technology report covering enterprise-level blockchain
applications: financial services, global… [https://godistributed.com/]
godistributed.com [https://godistributed.com/]

Bitcoin Magazine - Bitcoin, Blockchain, and Ethereum News, Prices, Charts &
Analysis [https://bitcoinmagazine.com/]
Founded in 2011, Bitcoin Magazine is the oldest and most trusted source of
news,
insight, reviews, guides, and price… [https://bitcoinmagazine.com/]
bitcoinmagazine.com [https://bitcoinmagazine.com/]

yBitcoin.com / Introducing the Future of Money [https://ybitcoin.com/]
Bitcoin is the perfect currency and payment system for our digital age. It is
decentralized, open source, and highly… [https://ybitcoin.com/]ybitcoin.com
[https://ybitcoin.com/]

Home | Lets Talk Bitcoin [https://letstalkbitcoin.com/]
The LTB Network provides a tokenized platform for podcasts, articles, and
forums
about the ideas, people, and projects… [https://letstalkbitcoin.com/]
letstalkbitcoin.com [https://letstalkbitcoin.com/]

Devsub | Dive Deep into Blockchain Development [http://devsub.io/]
Deep Dive into Blockchain Development [http://devsub.io/]devsub.io
[http://devsub.io/]

Thank you,

Particl Team
node.html:
This is just the beginning!

Particl Foundation is proud to partner with BTC Studios- a division of BTC Media, to help foster awareness on decentralized marketplaces, individual sovereignty, right to privacy and self-governing, crypto-agnostic platforms.

There is so much more to Particl than our PART token. Sure we’ve taken the best Bitcoin offers and made it more private with Confidential Transactions and RingCT. It’s true being the first token with SegWit native at launch makes all transactions on the Particl blockchain Segregated Witness transactions. However, these essential privacy enhancements are only one piece of the puzzle Particl has it’s sights set on solving. But that stuff most of you already know…

The problem is not many users outside our growing community know about Particl and the innovative work the development team has delivered and is planning to deliver over the next 6 months. That’s where BTC Studios comes in and we’re so excited to begin!

BTC Media

BTC Media’s team has over 60 years of combined publishing experience. We publish the world’s only print magazines about the Bitcoin and blockchain industries, and operate several of the most recognized and trusted online resources, reaching millions of readers worldwide. Our unique insight into this world is why leading companies, such as Nasdaq, rely on us to power their blockchain content.

Distributed
The weekly blockchain technology report covering enterprise-level blockchain applications: financial services, global…godistributed.com

Bitcoin Magazine - Bitcoin, Blockchain, and Ethereum News, Prices, Charts & Analysis
Founded in 2011, Bitcoin Magazine is the oldest and most trusted source of news, insight, reviews, guides, and price…bitcoinmagazine.com

yBitcoin.com / Introducing the Future of Money

childHtmlRehype.html:
This is just the beginning!

Particl Foundation is proud to partner with BTC Studios- a division of BTC Media, to help foster awareness on decentralized marketplaces, individual sovereignty, right to privacy and self-governing, crypto-agnostic platforms.

There is so much more to Particl than our PART token. Sure we’ve taken the best Bitcoin offers and made it more private with Confidential Transactions and RingCT. It’s true being the first token with SegWit native at launch makes all transactions on the Particl blockchain Segregated Witness transactions. However, these essential privacy enhancements are only one piece of the puzzle Particl has it’s sights set on solving. But that stuff most of you already know…

The problem is not many users outside our growing community know about Particl and the innovative work the development team has delivered and is planning to deliver over the next 6 months. That’s where BTC Studios comes in and we’re so excited to begin!

BTC Media

BTC Media’s team has over 60 years of combined publishing experience. We publish the world’s only print magazines about the Bitcoin and blockchain industries, and operate several of the most recognized and trusted online resources, reaching millions of readers worldwide. Our unique insight into this world is why leading companies, such as Nasdaq, rely on us to power their blockchain content.

Brands:

Distributed
The weekly blockchain technology report covering enterprise-level blockchain applications: financial services, global…godistributed.com

Bitcoin Magazine - Bitcoin, Blockchain, and Ethereum News, Prices, Charts & Analysis
Founded in 2011, Bitcoin Magazine is the oldest and most trusted source of news, insight, reviews, guides, and price…bitcoinmagazine.com

node.title: 3rd manual distribution of PART is complete.
node.plaintext:
Overfunders & Group 1 Claimants
Wednesday’s PART disbursement went out today. Thank you for completing the
wallet set up, enjoy staking those tokens!

Still waiting for your PART?
Please read Post launch update: July 24th, 2017
[https://particl.news/post-launch-update-july-24th-2017-419f55ddc89f] to see the
groups we’ve identified and the steps you need to take to secure your PART
token.

📣 Our next manual distribution will be Wednesday, August 16th. Don’t wait any
longer, set up your wallet
[https://particl.news/guide-how-to-generate-your-particl-exchange-passphrase-1fd78ba36fd1] 
and get your tokens!

PART tokens not showing up in your wallet?
The best assistance you can get is from the Particl Community members in our
#help slack channel. I would encourage you to signup [http://slack.particl.io/] 
and we will get you straightened away faster than you can track a bitcoin
across
the blockchain [http://blog.wizsec.jp/2017/07/breaking-open-mtgox-1.html].

node.title: RELEASE: Particl Core 0.14.2.1

primary_tag.name: Development Updates
primary_tag.description: See a blockchain-powered autonomous internet marketplace wunderkind grow. You make a difference with Particl.

tags.name: Development Updates
tags.description: See a blockchain-powered autonomous internet marketplace wunderkind grow. You make a difference with Particl.

node.plaintext:
Merged Bitcoin 0.14.2 + bug fixes
The Particl Development Team released the latest version of the Particl Core
wallet: Release 0.14.2.1
[https://github.com/particl/particl-core/releases/tag/v0.14.2.1]

The biggest news with this release is merging the latest Bitcoin code. A
description of updates for Bitcoin Core 0.14.2 can be found here
[https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/blob/master/doc/release-notes/release-notes-0.14.2.md]
.

• New features and fixes:
 * Merged Bitcoin 0.14.2
 * Subtract fee from amount works from QT for all transaction types
 * Coincontrol inputs and change address
 * Rare unicode characters in recovery passphrase fix
 * New Windows installer binaries for x32 and x64
 * walletpassphrase silent fail fixed
 * dumpwallet exports all keys in json format

Thank you,

Particl Team
node.html:
Merged Bitcoin 0.14.2 + bug fixes

The Particl Development Team released the latest version of the Particl Core wallet: Release 0.14.2.1

The biggest news with this release is merging the latest Bitcoin code. A description of updates for Bitcoin Core 0.14.2 can be found here.

• New features and fixes:

  • Merged Bitcoin 0.14.2
  • Subtract fee from amount works from QT for all transaction types
  • Coincontrol inputs and change address
  • Rare unicode characters in recovery passphrase fix
  • New Windows installer binaries for x32 and x64
  • walletpassphrase silent fail fixed
  • dumpwallet exports all keys in json format

Thank you,

Particl Team

node.title: 1st manual distribution of PART is complete.
node.plaintext:
Overfunders & Group 1 Claimants
In our last blog post
[https://particl.news/post-launch-update-july-24th-2017-419f55ddc89f] we broke
down the remaining contributors waiting for their PART tokens. Every Wednesday
we are doing a combined distribution to everyone who creates their Particl
wallet that week. Last night was our first batch and all over-funders
[https://particl.news/tokens-holders-and-next-steps-part-1-b9d7cd7e7887] and
approved claimants from our Community Initiative #1
[https://particl.news/a-community-driven-initiative-e26724100c3a] who set up
their receiving address should have their PART.

Still waiting for your PART?
Please read Post launch update: July 24th, 2017
[https://particl.news/post-launch-update-july-24th-2017-419f55ddc89f] to see the
groups we’ve identified and the steps you need to take to secure your PART
token.

📣 Our next manual distribution will be Wednesday, August 3rd. Don’t wait any
longer, set up your wallet
[https://particl.news/guide-how-to-generate-your-particl-exchange-passphrase-1fd78ba36fd1] 
and get your tokens!

PART tokens not showing up in your wallet?
The best assistance you can get is from the Particl Community members in our
#help slack channel. I would encourage you to signup [http://slack.particl.io/] 
and we will get you straightened away faster than you can track a bitcoin
across
the blockchain [http://blog.wizsec.jp/2017/07/breaking-open-mtgox-1.html].

Thank you

Particl Team

Still waiting for your PART?

Thank you

Particl Team

node.title: Post launch update: July 24th, 2017
node.excerpt: One week in the books and so much more to do. BRING IT ON!
node.custom_excerpt: One week in the books and so much more to do. BRING IT ON!
node.plaintext:
One week in the books and so much more to do. BRING IT ON!
Particl successfully launches pure Proof of Stake blockchain the hard way
Did you know? Most Proof of Stake (PoS) chains are hybrid Proof of Work
(PoW)/PoS chains. That is because it’s easier to have miner nodes doing all the
work to secure the network and then switch over to a staking system than to
begin with staking nodes reserving their coins to secure the network. The
probability for forked or hijacked chains is high until the majority of tokens
are securing the network by staking. The Particl Team planned weeks in advance
and cycled through scenarios using testnet to ensure the smoothest launch
possible. One week later, the forethought paid off.

PART Distributed
Particl Blockchain launched Monday July 17, 2017 and every contributor who
created a Particl wallet ahead
[https://particl.news/reminder-create-your-particl-wallet-%EF%B8%8F-49cfe8871346] 
of mainnet launch and had PART token balances on Particl.io [https://particl.io] 
received their tokens within the first 100 blocks after Particl genesis block. A
number of PART tokens remain to be distributed manually by the team. If you
contributed to our project and still haven’t received your PART tokens please
read below. I’ve summed up 3 groups who still need some work done to receive
their PART tokens.

PART yet to be distributed
The team will be doing a weekly distribution batch every Wednesday for the
following groups of contributors yet to receive their PART tokens.

1 Contributors who have a balance on Particl.io but still need to create their
Particl wallet and accept the funding round Terms.

 * Please login to https://particl.io. We have a new page setup along with a new
   video to help guide you through the steps to gain access to your PART
 * Complete this by Wednesday and you will be included in this week’s batch!

2 Contributors who needed to have extra SDC and/or BTC converted to PART after
the funding round ended due to overfunding the project or sending tokens to the
transparency addresses by accident.

 * If you’ve created your Particl wallet already and only waiting for the team
   to distribute the coins then you don’t have to do anything, you’ll be
   included in this week’s Wednesday batch
 * If you’ve yet to create your Particl wallet and accept Terms of the funding
   round you need to:

> 1. Please login to https://particl.io. We have a new page setup along with a new
video to help guide you through the steps to gain access to your PART2. Complete
this by Wednesday and you will be included in this week’s batch!

3 Claimants who have been approved by the team to meet the qualifications of the
Particl Community Initiative #1 (Group 1)

 * Please login to https://particl.io. We have a new page setup along with a new
   video to help guide you through the steps to gain access to your PART
 * Complete this by Wednesday and you will be included in this week’s batch!

PART + BITTREX
Bittrex — The Next Generation Digital Currency Exchange added the Particl (PART)
token to their impressive list of crypto currency project tokens trading on
their market. Bittrex is one of the largest digital currency exchanges by volume
and many of you in our community already use them as your platform of choice. We
wanted to thank Bittrex for adding PART so our community, who is also your
community, can benefit from all you offer the ecosystem.

PART + CryptoID
Particl Team hosts our official Particl explorer built on Insight here: 
https://explorer.particl.io/

CryptoID or “Chainz” worked with our team to operate a node for their extensive
selection of data points across the Particl blockchain. This second Particl
blockchain explorer provides insight to staking, ownership, distribution and
much more. You can find it here: https://chainz.cryptoid.info/part/

PART + Coinmarket Cap
One of the best tools on the web for crypto currency enthusiasts is
CryptoCurrency Market Capitalizations. This long running site quickly gives you
a look into markets, projects and valuations on every cryptocurrency project in
the ecosystem. Particl has a page on there: 
https://coinmarketcap.com/currencies/particl/


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Interested in helping build Particl?
It is exciting when passion in the community manifests itself in unexpected
ways. Whether it’s helping break the testnet, bending tools like Angular and
Electron to your will or being really, really good at graphics and writing, our 
SLACK [http://slack.particl.io/] and RIOT
[https://riot.im/app/#/room/#particl:matrix.org] community channels are great
places to get involved.

Are you a professional, looking for new job opportunities?
We are actively seeking passionate, driven creatives in the following career
paths:

 * C++ Developer [https://particl.io/careers.html#c01]
 * Junior Developer [https://particl.io/careers.html#c02]
 * Social Media Coordinator [https://particl.io/careers.html#c03]

Please be sure to subscribe to this blog to stay up-to-date with the latest
news.

Thank you

Particl Team
node.html:
One week in the books and so much more to do. BRING IT ON!

Particl successfully launches pure Proof of Stake blockchain the hard way

Did you know? Most Proof of Stake (PoS) chains are hybrid Proof of Work (PoW)/PoS chains. That is because it’s easier to have miner nodes doing all the work to secure the network and then switch over to a staking system than to begin with staking nodes reserving their coins to secure the network. The probability for forked or hijacked chains is high until the majority of tokens are securing the network by staking. The Particl Team planned weeks in advance and cycled through scenarios using testnet to ensure the smoothest launch possible. One week later, the forethought paid off.

PART Distributed

Particl Blockchain launched Monday July 17, 2017 and every contributor who created a Particl wallet ahead of mainnet launch and had PART token balances on Particl.io received their tokens within the first 100 blocks after Particl genesis block. A number of PART tokens remain to be distributed manually by the team. If you contributed to our project and still haven’t received your PART tokens please read below. I’ve summed up 3 groups who still need some work done to receive their PART tokens.

PART yet to be distributed

The team will be doing a weekly distribution batch every Wednesday for the following groups of contributors yet to receive their PART tokens.

1 Contributors who have a balance on Particl.io but still need to create their Particl wallet and accept the funding round Terms.

  • Please login to https://particl.io. We have a new page setup along with a new video to help guide you through the steps to gain access to your PART
  • Complete this by Wednesday and you will be included in this week’s batch!

2 Contributors who needed to have extra SDC and/or BTC converted to PART after the funding round ended due to overfunding the project or sending tokens to the transparency addresses by accident.

  • If you’ve created your Particl wallet already and only waiting for the team to distribute the coins then you don’t have to do anything, you’ll be included in this week’s Wednesday batch
  • If you’ve yet to create your Particl wallet and accept Terms of the funding round you need to:
1. Please login to https://particl.io. We have a new page setup along with a new video to help guide you through the steps to gain access to your PART2. Complete this by Wednesday and you will be included in this week’s batch!

3 Claimants who have been approved by the team to meet the qualifications of the Particl Community Initiative #1 (Group 1)

  • Please login to https://particl.io. We have a new page setup along with a new video to help guide you through the steps to gain access to your PART
  • Complete this by Wednesday and you will be included in this week’s batch!

PART + BITTREX

Bittrex — The Next Generation Digital Currency Exchange added the Particl (PART) token to their impressive list of crypto currency project tokens trading on their market. Bittrex is one of the largest digital currency exchanges by volume and many of you in our community already use them as your platform of choice. We wanted to thank Bittrex for adding PART so our community, who is also your community, can benefit from all you offer the ecosystem.

PART + CryptoID

Particl Team hosts our official Particl explorer built on Insight here: https://explorer.particl.io/

CryptoID or “Chainz” worked with our team to operate a node for their extensive selection of data points across the Particl blockchain. This second Particl blockchain explorer provides insight to staking, ownership, distribution and much more. You can find it here: https://chainz.cryptoid.info/part/

PART + Coinmarket Cap

One of the best tools on the web for crypto currency enthusiasts is CryptoCurrency Market Capitalizations. This long running site quickly gives you a look into markets, projects and valuations on every cryptocurrency project in the ecosystem. Particl has a page on there: https://coinmarketcap.com/currencies/particl/

Interested in helping build Particl?

It is exciting when passion in the community manifests itself in unexpected ways. Whether it’s helping break the testnet, bending tools like Angular and Electron to your will or being really, really good at graphics and writing, our SLACK and RIOT community channels are great places to get involved.

Are you a professional, looking for new job opportunities?

We are actively seeking passionate, driven creatives in the following career paths:

  • C++ Developer
  • Junior Developer
  • Social Media Coordinator

Please be sure to subscribe to this blog to stay up-to-date with the latest news.

Thank you

Particl Team

childHtmlRehype.html:
One week in the books and so much more to do. BRING IT ON!

Particl successfully launches pure Proof of Stake blockchain the hard way

Did you know? Most Proof of Stake (PoS) chains are hybrid Proof of Work (PoW)/PoS chains. That is because it’s easier to have miner nodes doing all the work to secure the network and then switch over to a staking system than to begin with staking nodes reserving their coins to secure the network. The probability for forked or hijacked chains is high until the majority of tokens are securing the network by staking. The Particl Team planned weeks in advance and cycled through scenarios using testnet to ensure the smoothest launch possible. One week later, the forethought paid off.

PART Distributed

Particl Blockchain launched Monday July 17, 2017 and every contributor who created a Particl wallet ahead of mainnet launch and had PART token balances on Particl.io received their tokens within the first 100 blocks after Particl genesis block. A number of PART tokens remain to be distributed manually by the team. If you contributed to our project and still haven’t received your PART tokens please read below. I’ve summed up 3 groups who still need some work done to receive their PART tokens.

PART yet to be distributed

The team will be doing a weekly distribution batch every Wednesday for the following groups of contributors yet to receive their PART tokens.

1 Contributors who have a balance on Particl.io but still need to create their Particl wallet and accept the funding round Terms.

  • Please login to https://particl.io. We have a new page setup along with a new video to help guide you through the steps to gain access to your PART
  • Complete this by Wednesday and you will be included in this week’s batch!

2 Contributors who needed to have extra SDC and/or BTC converted to PART after the funding round ended due to overfunding the project or sending tokens to the transparency addresses by accident.

  • If you’ve created your Particl wallet already and only waiting for the team to distribute the coins then you don’t have to do anything, you’ll be included in this week’s Wednesday batch
  • If you’ve yet to create your Particl wallet and accept Terms of the funding round you need to:
1. Please login to https://particl.io. We have a new page setup along with a new video to help guide you through the steps to gain access to your PART2. Complete this by Wednesday and you will be included in this week’s batch!

3 Claimants who have been approved by the team to meet the qualifications of the Particl Community Initiative #1 (Group 1)

  • Please login to https://particl.io. We have a new page setup along with a new video to help guide you through the steps to gain access to your PART
  • Complete this by Wednesday and you will be included in this week’s batch!

PART + BITTREX

Bittrex — The Next Generation Digital Currency Exchange added the Particl (PART) token to their impressive list of crypto currency project tokens trading on their market. Bittrex is one of the largest digital currency exchanges by volume and many of you in our community already use them as your platform of choice. We wanted to thank Bittrex for adding PART so our community, who is also your community, can benefit from all you offer the ecosystem.

PART + CryptoID

Particl Team hosts our official Particl explorer built on Insight here: https://explorer.particl.io/

CryptoID or “Chainz” worked with our team to operate a node for their extensive selection of data points across the Particl blockchain. This second Particl blockchain explorer provides insight to staking, ownership, distribution and much more. You can find it here: https://chainz.cryptoid.info/part/

PART + Coinmarket Cap

One of the best tools on the web for crypto currency enthusiasts is CryptoCurrency Market Capitalizations. This long running site quickly gives you a look into markets, projects and valuations on every cryptocurrency project in the ecosystem. Particl has a page on there: https://coinmarketcap.com/currencies/particl/

Interested in helping build Particl?

It is exciting when passion in the community manifests itself in unexpected ways. Whether it’s helping break the testnet, bending tools like Angular and Electron to your will or being really, really good at graphics and writing, our SLACK and RIOT community channels are great places to get involved.

Are you a professional, looking for new job opportunities?

We are actively seeking passionate, driven creatives in the following career paths:

  • C++ Developer
  • Junior Developer
  • Social Media Coordinator

Please be sure to subscribe to this blog to stay up-to-date with the latest news.

Thank you

Particl Team

node.title: Particl Launch Update: July 17th, 2017
node.plaintext:
Today is a good day!
Particl Blockchain is LIVE thanks to all involved, especially to our
contributors.

Getting started:
1First, head over to our Github for the official wallet releases.

Please only use these official compiles, don’t use any other source for your
wallet releases or click on links quoted in forums. This is an easy attack
vector for nefarious individuals to prey on the less experienced user.

 * Official link to Particl wallets: 
   https://github.com/particl/particl-core/releases

2Second, import your pre-generated Particl Wallet.

Community member B.B.2K has once again created a simple video walk-thru of how
to import your mnemonic keys to begin receiving your PART distribution.

3Third, allow Particl blockchain to advance 100–200 blocks into existence before
seeing total balance.

Please wait patiently as the PART tokens for our seed funders is distributed
automatically by the Particl Blockchain. In our testnet versions, token
distribution happened within 100 blocks or 200 minutes (2 minute blocks).

 * Particl Explorer: https://explorer.particl.io/

Thank you

Particl Team
